failingAudits.explanation: Points to the domain's root URL (the homepage) instead of the equivalent page of content. /skills' canonical points to /.
30 SVGs have role="img" but no accessible name. SVGR generates role="img" by default; parents (NavBar links, Carousel, Timeline) carry the meaning so the SVGs themselves are decorative.

notes:
LCP regressed 2.2s -> 2.6s vs post-Stage-7. FCP improved 1.2s -> 1.1s and SI improved 2.4s -> 1.8s, so first paint and visual completeness are both faster. LCP element is the

Work Experience

; breakdown is TTFB 254ms + element render delay 184ms (observed 439ms; simulated under 4x CPU throttling).
12 separate render-blocking CSS files load on /skills (one per lazy component's preloaded stylesheet, plus the route's own CSS chain). That's the cost of Stage 6's manual CSS-preload pattern.
